CVE-2017-7827.title: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 56. Some of these bug ...
CVE-2017-7827.summary: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 56. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort that some of these could be exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 57.

CVE-2017-7831.title: A vulnerability where the security wrapper does not deny access t ...
CVE-2017-7831.summary: A vulnerability where the security wrapper does not deny access to some exposed properties using the deprecated "_exposedProps_" mechanism on proxy objects. These properties should be explicitly unavailable to proxy objects. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 57.

CVE-2018-5090.title: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 57. Some of these bug ...
CVE-2018-5090.summary: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 57. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort that some of these could be exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 58.

CVE-2018-5093.title: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability may occur in WebAssembly dur ...
CVE-2018-5093.summary: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability may occur in WebAssembly during Memory/Table resizing, resulting in a potentially exploitable crash. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 58.

CVE-2018-5094.title: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability may occur in WebAssembly whe ...
CVE-2018-5094.summary: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability may occur in WebAssembly when "shrinkElements" is called followed by garbage collection on memory that is now uninitialized. This results in a potentially exploitable crash. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 58.

CVE-2018-5126.summary: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 58. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort that some of these could be exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 59.

CVE-2018-5145.title: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox ESR 52.6. These bugs  ...
CVE-2018-5145.summary: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox ESR 52.6. These bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort that some of these could be exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects Firefox ESR < 52.7 and Thunderbird < 52.7.

CVE-2018-5151.summary: Memory safety bugs were reported in Firefox 59. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort that some of these could be exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 60.
